name: @equaltoai/greater-components-agent
description: Agent-first workflow surfaces, contracts, package boundaries, and rollout shape metadata for Greater Components.

AgentIdentityCard.description: Identity summary card for agent handles, stewardship, and readiness metrics.

AgentStateBadge.description: Phase/state badge for workflow-aware agent surfaces.

SoulRequestCard.description: Request intake card for soul requests, constraints, and artifacts.

SoulLifecycleRail.description: Lifecycle rail showing request through continuity phases with active status.

ReviewDecisionCard.description: Review summary card for decision state, findings, and evidence.

DeclarationPreviewCard.description: Preview card for declaration statements, scope, and risks.

SignatureCheckpointCard.description: Signer checklist and readiness card for approval checkpoints.

ContinuityPanel.description: Continuity ownership panel for follow-up loops, metrics, and feedback.

GraduationSummaryCard.description: Graduation summary card for readiness, exit criteria, and next steps.

boundaries.description: Boundary lookup helpers and direct package naming metadata.

workflow.description: Reusable workflow phases, slot naming, state definitions, and lookup helpers.

stitch.description: Stitch anchor mapping from real design screens into reusable component families and export surfaces.

surfaces.description: Shared data models and formatting helpers for reusable agent workflow surfaces.
